plugins.name: sa
plugins.description: Simple Agents — command-free skills + subagents for fast single-feature development: plan, approve, isolate in a worktree, implement, PR

plugins.name: ha
plugins.description: Higher Agents — the thorough counterpart to sa for building ONE feature properly: deep red-teamed plan, SDD per-task loop plus a risk-scaled pre-PR adversarial gate, independent review, apply feedback, gated merge. Leverages the superpowers disciplines (required dependency); model-agnostic

plugins.name: ca
plugins.description: Cooperate Agents — Claude×Codex loop (plan & review side): draft a plan sparring with Codex, then review the Codex-built diff against it
